description: Fintables is a Turkish financial analysis platform focused on Borsa İstanbul data, company financials, market research, and investor tools. It also offers Evo, an AI assistant that can access Fintables market data.
summary: Fintables exposes an OAuth-protected remote MCP server at `https://evo.fintables.com/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
